title: st. schwarz
text:
What I Do
If I come to a really interesting task, i can spend much effort into developing scripts and routines for corpus building or data/literature analysis up to publication of the results in nice looking papers or online. I sometimes have difficulties to indeed find that interesting task or research question, but with that in hand can’t stop coding…

title: st. schwarz
text:
Research & Publications

see link in projects.

title: st. schwarz
text:
Teaching
I have developed class tutorial workflows covering archiving and building upon corpora from digitized written and spoken material.
